system.powerDescription:
Pick one of the following category of substances: 

• Metal 
• Wood 
• Stone 
• Plastic 

Whenever the chosen substance touches you or any objects you are holding/wearing it becomes incredibly brittle, soft, and/or fragile. This applies whenever you directly touch on an object and may spread up to CAT meters from the impact point. At the end of this scene any affected objects regain their normal durability. 

Gain or grant+1D on the next action that benefits from this power. This power may easily modify the parameters of a roll whilst active.
